title: IT293RSR ARCHIVED - Debtor's gain on settlement of debt - Canada.ca
content:
## IT293RSR ARCHIVED - Debtor's gain on settlement of debt

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This Special Release constitutes an update to IT-293R dealing with the gain that a debtor realizes, in settling a debt or other obligation otherwise than by the paymenty in full of the principal amount, is applied to reduce losses in a specific order.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format it293rsr-e.html
